ops.text: RUN SYNTHESIS (2026-07-12, resume of session 2bc46999 orchestration): E8 CLOSED — winner 8b_r32@1950 (AUC 0.9186 vs v001 0.8534, abstain F1 0.713 vs 0.160, option-resolution 0.404 vs 0.021) but NO PROMOTION: widened corrective stratum showed no separable same-direction gain (1/18 vs 0/23 fired, Fisher p=0.439); independent codex audit confirmed no-promote, REFUTED the CI-overlap framing (degenerate bootstrap at 0/n, disjoint fired sets, shared controls) -> E8 reclassified INCONCLUSIVE; corrected-gate requirements journaled in EXP E8 log. v001 stays promoted. E9 BUILT+RUN with audit-corrected machinery (exact Clopper-Pearson + paired sign test in harness/metrics.py; run_e9.py): rewrite-only stage 3 DROPPED — v001 0W/29T/0L p=1.0, winner 1W/10T/0L p=1.0 on fired prose; C3/E7 grid skipped as moot. KEY DIAGNOSTIC: both watchers fire on only 29/373 (v001) and 11/373 (winner) prose rows — fires concentrate on QA rows; corrective lift needs training/threshold work (fire coverage + draft content), not rewording. OPS: watcher stall premise falsified (gate selectivity), daemon now launchd-supervised (com.cc-steer.watch, KeepAlive proven, 15 proposals); cc-notes v0.24 flag drift fixed in lab notes.py + prod journal.py (pipeline journaling was silently broken); D3 nightly shadow-report journaling shipped (0828f69, live-verified: 2 steers -> 1 hit/1 nuisance); D4 parity verified (test_parity_mlx 2 passed, real dual-model). CROSS-REPO: unshipped cc-transcript WIP (mining.sampling + watch) landed upstream as a8cdf46+467017b, cct CI green — cc-steer CI unblocking pending rerun. Spend: Tinker $17.7/60 (no new), E9 ~120 frontier calls.
